title: Mojo Optimized
description: An unofficial and highly recommended optimization modpack for Mojolauncher.
body:
### Mojo Optimized 

Mojo Optimized is a modpack especially made for [Mojolauncher](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=git.artdeell.mojo) it contains various kinds of optimization mods that work with mojo. Mojo Optimized is also recommended from the Mojo community. If you find any issues with mojo or this modpack you can get support form my [discord](https://dsc.gg/CopperLauncher) or from Mojolauncher official [discord](https://discord.com/invite/VHdwQFsaGX) server.

**Latest video from me:<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/D8cz-I_A_l8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>**
**Mods that are currently in Mojo Optimized (latest version only):**

- [BBE](https://modrinth.com/mod/ONZm0H7Y) by ceeden
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/g96Z4WVZ) by Thosea
- [Cloth Config v26\.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g) by shedaniel
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/VSNURh3q) by RelativityMC, ishland
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/LQ3K71Q1) by juliand665, LostLuma
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) by tr7zw
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) by FabricMC
- [Fast Noise](https://modrinth.com/mod/OnlVIpq5) by ZenXArch
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) by malte0811
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci) by RK\_01
- [Ixeris](https://modrinth.com/mod/p8RJPJIC) by decce
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/uLbm7CG6) by Jerozgen
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) by JellySquid, 2No2Name
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM) by Prospector, haykam821, gniftygnome, TerraformersMC
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/TjSm1wrD) by embeddedt
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/51shyZVL) by FX \- PR0CESS, 1Foxy2
- [Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/eXts2L7r) by Patbox
- [Podium](https://modrinth.com/mod/fW8woQj4) by AndreasMelone
- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ps1zyz6x) by Spottedleaf, ishland
- [ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/4WWQxlQP) by Wesley1808
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) by JellySquid \(jellysquid3\)
- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/vSEH1ERy) by getchoo, UltimateBoomer, fantahund
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/wnEe9KBa) by ishland
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) by FlashyReese
